## Section 6 — Remediation Execution Eligibility Gate

### Gate Definition

Controlled remediation execution rerun (RE-01 through RE-11) is eligible only when ALL of the following are true simultaneously:

| Gate condition | Required value | Current status |
|---|---|---|
| B4B-01 — BA-01, BA-02 approved | RESOLVED | ✅ RESOLVED |
| B4B-02 — BA-03, BA-04 approved | RESOLVED AT APPROVAL LEVEL | ✅ RESOLVED AT APPROVAL LEVEL |
| B4B-03 — BA-05 through BA-08 approved | RESOLVED AT APPROVAL LEVEL | ✅ RESOLVED AT APPROVAL LEVEL |
| B4B-04 — BA-09 through BA-15 approved | RESOLVED AT APPROVAL LEVEL | ✅ RESOLVED AT APPROVAL LEVEL |
| B4B-05 — BA-16, BA-17 approved | RESOLVED AT APPROVAL LEVEL | ✅ RESOLVED AT APPROVAL LEVEL |
| B4B-06 — 29 indexes physically created and DBA-confirmed | FULLY RESOLVED | ❌ **PENDING — DBA confirmation required** |
| All 17 P0 BA items (BA-01 through BA-17) resolved | YES | ✅ YES |
| Remediation execution explicitly approved by owner | YES | ❌ **NOT YET PRESENTED** |

### Gate Result

**REMEDIATION EXECUTION RERUN: NOT ELIGIBLE**

Reason: B4B-06 is not yet fully resolved. DBA has not confirmed physical index creation. Remediation execution rerun cannot be presented or initiated until B4B-06 is fully resolved and a separate remediation execution approval gate is presented and approved by the owner.

### What Happens After B4B-06 Is Fully Resolved

After the DBA confirms index creation and Base44 marks B4B-06 as fully resolved, the next step is **NOT** automatic remediation execution. The next step is:

1. Base44 updates this report to record B4B-06 as FULLY RESOLVED.
2. Base44 presents the **Controlled Remediation Execution Approval Gate** to the owner.
3. The owner reviews the full RE-01 through RE-11 execution plan and explicitly approves.
4. Only after explicit approval does controlled remediation execution begin.

**Remediation execution does not start automatically under any condition.**

## Section 9 — Message to DBA / Infrastructure Admin

The following message should be sent to the DBA or infrastructure admin responsible for executing the approved index creation script.

---

**To: DBA / Infrastructure Admin**
**Subject: MGA Phase 4A — Action Required: Execute Approved Index Creation Script**
**Priority: Required before remediation execution can proceed**

Please execute the approved MGA Phase 4A index creation script located at:

```
docs/MGA_PHASE_4A_INDEX_CREATION_SCRIPT.md
```

**Approved indexes to create:**
- Indexes **1–26** (inclusive)
- Indexes **28–30** (inclusive)
- **Total: 29 indexes**

**DO NOT create index #27 (MasterGeneralAgentUser).** Index #27 is explicitly excluded from this batch. It requires a separate Platform Admin authorization after RE-04 MasterGroup seeding produces records.

The script contains the complete DDL for each index, along with EXPLAIN-based validation queries and rollback/drop instructions. Please execute in the order listed in the DBA Execution Checklist at the bottom of the script.

**After creation, please validate each index** using the validation query provided in the script for each index (or your preferred DBA validation method) and return the following confirmation to Base44:

```
Indexes have been created by our DBA.

DBA/admin name: [name]
Role: [role]
Timestamp: [YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM timezone]
Execution environment: [production / staging / describe]
Indexes created: indexes 1–26 and 28–30
Indexes failed: [none / list any with reason]
Validation method: [EXPLAIN / pg_indexes / DBA tool / other]
Validation result: PASS
Index #27 excluded: confirmed

Additional notes: [any DDL errors, performance observations, or anomalies]
```

Once Base44 receives this confirmation, B4B-06 will be marked FULLY RESOLVED and the controlled remediation execution approval gate will be presented. Remediation execution does not start automatically.
